title: openssl bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[3.5.1-5.0.1]
- Enable openssl-fips-provider dependency [Orabug: 36504822]
- Temporary disable openssl-fips-provider dependency [Orabug: 36504822]
- Replace upstream references [Orabug: 34340177]

[3.5.1.openela.0.1]
- Add OpenELA specific changes

[1:3.5.1-5]
- Do not make key share choice in tls1_set_groups()
  Resolves: RHEL-131010
full_text:
[3.5.1-5.0.1]
- Enable openssl-fips-provider dependency [Orabug: 36504822]
- Temporary disable openssl-fips-provider dependency [Orabug: 36504822]
- Replace upstream references [Orabug: 34340177]

[3.5.1.openela.0.1]
- Add OpenELA specific changes

[1:3.5.1-5]
- Do not make key share choice in tls1_set_groups()
  Resolves: RHEL-131010

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2026-0438.html
